user.title: Set up PiyoLog
user.description: Choose how you want to authenticate with PiyoLog

data_description.auth_method: Create new account and link it, or use existing credentials

auth_method.create_new: Create new account and link to existing

create.title: Create New Account
create.description: Create a new PiyoLog device. This will generate credentials that you'll use to link to your existing account.

existing.title: Use Existing Credentials
existing.description: Enter your existing PiyoLog credentials. You can find these in your PiyoLog app settings or from a previous setup.

link.title: Link to Existing Account
link.description:
Enter your PiyoLog User ID and Share Code. To get these:
1. Open PiyoLog app
2. Go to Settings → Share
3. Tap 'Issue Code'
4. Enter the displayed information below

select_baby.title: Select Default Baby
select_baby.description: Choose which baby should be used by default for events

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to PiyoLog API
